response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (fintech, ad-tech, GIS, embedded) with strong fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and distributed systems at Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal role. The seniority gap is also notable: Staff-level experience exists but no demonstrated IC6/Principal-level cross-org influence on growth measurement or experimentation systems.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering (TypeScript, Node, C/C++, Java, DLang, Python-adjacent) with proven low-latency, high-scale work at Sociomantic
Strong software-craftsmanship foundation: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, and active mentoring through workshops and talks
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) aligns with the AI-first growth platform angle
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the core of the role
No evidence of telemetry/metrics platform work or statistical/experimental analysis depth required for IC6 growth engineering
Lacks Principal-level cross-team/multi-workstream leadership track record; highest title is Staff, with no described org-wide platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering breadth and scale experience
No evidence of IC6/Principal-level cross-org influence
